name: CARPENTER TECHNOLOGY CORP
business: Carpenter Technology Corporation is a producer and distributor of premium specialty alloys, including titanium alloys, powder metals, stainless steels, alloy steels, and tool steels. The company serves critical applications in aerospace, defense, medical, transportation, energy, industrial and consumer markets. It also produces alloys specifically engineered for additive manufacturing processes and soft magnetics applications.

exposures.sentence: We are a recognized leader in high-performance specialty alloy-based materials and process solutions for critical applications in the aerospace, defense, medical, transportation, energy, industrial and consumer markets.

We are a recognized leader in high-performance specialty alloy-based materials and process solutions for critical applications in the aerospace, defense, medical, transportation, energy, industrial and consumer markets.

We are a recognized leader in high-performance specialty alloy-based materials and process solutions for critical applications in the aerospace, defense, medical, transportation, energy, industrial and consumer markets.
A significant portion of our sales represents products sold to customers in the commercial aerospace, defense and energy markets.

We have evolved to become a pioneer in premium specialty alloys, including titanium, nickel, and cobalt, as well as alloys specifically engineered for additive manufacturing processes and soft magnetics applications.

We have evolved to become a pioneer in premium specialty alloys, including titanium, nickel, and cobalt, as well as alloys specifically engineered for additive manufacturing processes and soft magnetics applications.

Cybersecurity attacks and other security breaches or failures in functionality of our information technology ("IT") and computer systems could adversely impact our financial condition and results of operations and compromise the integrity of confidential data.
Regulations related to conflict minerals could adversely impact our business.

Our manufacturing processes, and the manufacturing processes of many of our suppliers and customers, are energy intensive and generate carbon dioxide and other "Greenhouse Gases," and pending legislation or regulation of Greenhouse Gases, if enacted or adopted in an onerous form, could have a material adverse impact on our results of operations, financial condition and cash flows.

catalysts.event: Collective bargaining agreement expiration for Dynamet Washington, PA employees
catalysts.sentence: As of June 30, 2025, there were 179 production employees at our Dynamet business unit located in Washington, Pennsylvania are covered by a collective bargaining agreement which expires on August 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Collective bargaining agreement expiration for Latrobe, PA employees
catalysts.sentence: As of June 30, 2025, there were 461 production employees at our Latrobe business unit located in Latrobe, Pennsylvania are covered by a collective bargaining agreement which expires on July 31, 2027.

catalysts.event: Environmental capital projects spending of approximately $0.4 million in fiscal year 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate spending approximately $0.8 million on environmental capital projects over the next five fiscal years. This includes approximately $0.4 million in fiscal year 2026.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures, including brownfield expansion, in fiscal year 2026 expected in range of $280.0 million to $300.0 million
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal year 2026, we expect capital expenditures, including the brownfield expansion, to be in the range of $280.0 million to $300.0 million.
